reasoning.summary: The call to 'io_fn' is effectful, but the enclosing function has not declared io.

hypotheses.title: The enclosing function omits required effects
hypotheses.detail: The effect checker tracked effectful behavior and determined that `io` is used without being declared on the caller.

hypotheses.title: A previously-pure wrapper started calling effectful helpers
hypotheses.detail: This often appears after introducing IO/time/rand/net/fs helpers without updating the wrapper signature.

next_actions: Add or update `effects { io }` on the enclosing function.
